name: agent-workflows
description: Personal workflow skills for agent task planning and execution.

interface.longDescription: A local skills-only plugin for reusable agent workflows such as structured planning, stepwise problem solving, coding guidelines, output formatting, Git operation discipline, plan stress-testing, and task execution discipline. It intentionally does not ship MCP servers.
defaultPrompt: Use a workflows-prefixed skill to plan this task.
Apply workflows-sequential-thinking to evidence-driven debugging, diagnostics, or complex multi-step work.
Break this ambiguous request into a validated plan.
Apply workflows-output-formatting to any dense user-facing response so it keeps important details while becoming easier to read.
Apply workflows-guidelines to keep non-trivial engineering edits simple, surgical, and verifiable.
Apply workflows-git-operations before creating branches, staging, committing, pulling, pushing, rolling back, or clearing stale Git index locks.
Use Workflows Grill Me to stress-test this plan with focused questions.
